rule_metadata.name: Android_Godlike
rule_metadata.author: Jacob Soo Lead Re
rule_metadata.description: This rule will be able to tag all the samples with local exploits.

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule Android_Godlike
{
	meta:
		author = "Jacob Soo Lead Re"
		date = "01-July-2016"
		description = "This rule will be able to tag all the samples with local exploits."
		source = "http://blog.trendmicro.com/trendlabs-security-intelligence/godless-mobile-malware-uses-multiple-exploits-root-devices/"

	strings:
		$a = "libgodlikelib.so"

	condition:
		(androguard.service ( /godlike\.s/i ) and androguard.service ( /godlike\.g/i ) and androguard.receiver ( /godlike\.e/i ) ) or $a
}

rule_metadata.name: Android_Godlike_2
rule_metadata.author: Jacob Soo Lead Re
rule_metadata.description: This rule will be able to tag all the samples with remote exploits.

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule Android_Godlike_2
{
	meta:
		author = "Jacob Soo Lead Re"
		date = "01-July-2016"
		description = "This rule will be able to tag all the samples with remote exploits."
		source = "http://blog.trendmicro.com/trendlabs-security-intelligence/godless-mobile-malware-uses-multiple-exploits-root-devices/"

	strings:
		$a_1 = "libroot.so"
		$a_2 = "silent91_arm_bin.root"
		$a_3 = "libr.so"
		$a_4 = "libpl_droidsonroids_gif.so"

	condition:
		(androguard.service ( /FastInstallService/i ) and androguard.service ( /DownloadService/i ) ) and any of ( $a_* )
}
